calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Settlement on the record. Judge Pro Temp: Sadhana Narayan (room 617), Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Robert Cohn, Esq. for Plaintiff: U.S. Bank National Assoc. As Successor Trustee to Wacchovia Bank., represented by Macia Thomas.
Defendant: Efrain Barrientos, present in pro per with Spanish Interpreter Edwin Carreto.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff shall obtain the possession of the subject premises, and the Defendant shall surrender the premises on or before Dec. 1, 2009 along with the keys in exchange for $2,000.00 payment from the Plaintiff. Defendant waived any extension.
Plaintiff may apply for an ex parte motion for Judgment if defendant failed to comply.
Parties agreed to sign a stipulation for entry of judgment, and agreed to terms in open court.
The Court declared the matter settled. Trial is vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Judge Pro Tem: Stan Bair; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported. (Dept. 207).
Appearances:
Robert Cohen, Esq. for the plaintiff U.S. Bank National Assoc. as Successor Trustee to Wachovia Bank.
Charles Spiegel, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant Efrain Barrientos.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.
Case not settled, TRIAL DATE CONFIRMED.
